raw_text: Enable Redis caching for recommendations (TTL 300s already defined) to avoid recomputing the aggregate on every request.
Eliminate N+1 order_items lookups by batching or joining order_items for the user in one query.
Replace baseline LIKE search with the optimized full-text path to avoid sequential scans on products.
Batch product price lookup and order_items inserts to reduce per-item round trips.
